nasb.text: from Aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of Arnon, even as far as Mount Sion (that is, Hermon),

esv.text: from Aroer, which is on the edge of the Valley of the Arnon, as far as Mount Sirion (that is, Hermon),

cnv.text: 從亞嫩谷邊的亞羅珥，直到西雲山，西雲山就是黑門山；

ccb.text: 其国土从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥一直到西云山，即黑门山，
